lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained. There is some minor cosmetic wear on the interior and exterior from normal use.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it left the showroom. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips, scratches, or dings. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, with premium surfaces that show zero signs of wear. Mechanically, it is perfect, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. This is a rare find for a collector or anyone seeking a showroom-quality vehicle.

The vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission are well-maintained and function reliably. The exterior is clean with a few minor surface scratches. The interior is well-kept and shows light wear from regular use.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom-quality condition. It has been meticulously cared for and kept in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a flawless exterior with no scratches, dents, or chips. The interior is equally immaculate, featuring premium materials that still look and smell brand new. Mechanically, the car performs perfectly, with all systems functioning exactly as they did on day one. This is a rare find for a collector or an enthusiast looking for a vehicle in absolute mint condition.

Attention all project car lovers! This is your chance to pick up a vehicle with tons of potential at a rock-bottom price. While it is currently in poor condition and will require some significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to get back on the road, it serves as a perfect blank canvas for a restoration enthusiast or a great source for parts. If you're looking for a rewarding weekend project, this is the one for you!

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies automotive reliability and sophisticated engineering. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. Offering a refined aesthetic and a robust powertrain, this selection represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-quality pre-owned vehicle.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that still looks great and drives even better? I'm parting with my car and it's been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect daily driver for someone who wants quality without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather seating, dual-zone climate control, and a premium sound system that all function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, including a recent brake service and a fresh oil change. The engine runs smooth and quiet, while the transmission provides seamless shifts. Sold with a clean title and a comprehensive folder of maintenance receipts, this car offers a turn-key experience for a buyer seeking a high-quality, dependable ride.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle that exemplifies consistent maintenance and refined performance. This specimen has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our high standards of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner. We invite you to acquire this dependable asset, which represents a superb balance of value and longevity.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a harmonious balance of proven performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a refined aesthetic and a comprehensive service history. This remains a premier choice within its class, delivering an uncompromising driving experience and exceptional value for the professional motorist.

Hey there! Thanks for stopping by! I’m selling my trusty car, and honestly, it’s been such a reliable companion. It’s in really solid shape and drives like a dream—perfect for someone who wants a dependable ride without the brand-new price tag. I’ve kept up with the maintenance, so it’s ready to hit the road whenever you are! Feel free to message me if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Equipped with a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, it offers an unadulterated mechanical connection. The chassis remains taut with recently refreshed bushings, and the Vanos system has been serviced to ensure optimal variable valve timing. A driver-focused example with minimal parasitic loss and near-perfect weight distribution, this machine is mechanically sorted and ready for the apex.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Runs well. Minimal interior wear. Regularly serviced.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, while the alloy wheels remain in excellent shape. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with premium upholstery that shows minimal wear, fully functional climate control, and an intuitive infotainment system. Mechanically, the car is sound; it has been serviced regularly, with recent oil changes and brake inspections documented. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts effortlessly, providing a confident and comfortable driving experience. Whether you’re commuting or taking a weekend trip, this car offers a turnkey solution for its next owner. It’s a solid, dependable choice that has been looked after with pride.

We are pleased to present this expertly maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a superior standard of automotive care. This selection offers a refined driving experience, characterized by mechanical reliability and a well-preserved interior and exterior aesthetic. Rigorously inspected to ensure consistent performance, this automobile represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning professional seeking both value and distinction. We invite you to experience the enduring quality and sophisticated engineering that define this remarkable offering.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, meticulously maintained to ensure continued mechanical excellence and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this model offers a seamless blend of performance and reliability. It represents a superior value proposition for the discerning driver seeking a refined automotive experience without compromise.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride that’s still in really solid shape and ready for its next adventure! It’s been well-loved and taken care of, so it runs smoothly and looks great. Whether you’re commuting to work or heading out on a road trip, this car is a total joy to drive. I'm looking for a quick, easy sale to a good home, so come take a look and see for yourself why I've enjoyed it so much!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies and a high-precision Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically sound, the VANOS system has been recently serviced, and the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced—a critical preventative measure for this chassis. The factory limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction, complemented by a suspension setup that maintains its original damping characteristics. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the car remains a driver
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable performance. Minor cosmetic wear.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a driver seeking a reliable, well-maintained car that balances performance with everyday utility. The exterior maintains a lustrous finish, showing only the minor, superficial signs of road use one would expect from a carefully driven vehicle. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the seats are supportive and the upholstery remains supple, free of any significant wear or odors. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, featuring a responsive engine and a smooth-shifting transmission that handles city streets and highways with equal ease. We have stayed diligent with the service schedule, recently completing a full multi-point inspection and oil change to ensure it is road-ready for its next owner. This is a solid, honest car that offers a premium driving experience and many more miles of dependable service.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and reliability. Demonstrating consistent maintenance and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a refined driving experience characteristic of its class. A definitive investment in quality, this automobile stands as a testament to engineering durability and sophisticated design.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it presents in commendable condition both mechanically and aesthetically. An ideal choice for the discerning professional seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride. It’s in wonderful shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're heading to work or going on a weekend road trip, this car is ready to go! It’s been well-loved, looks great, and runs beautifully. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. Critical preventive maintenance has been addressed, including a Vanos system refresh and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under lateral loads. The suspension maintains its factory-spec damping characteristics, offering exceptional turn-in response and chassis composure. While the exterior displays minor stone chips and patina indicative of a well-driven enthusiast vehicle, the mechanical vitals remain robust,
Reliable daily driver. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior scratches. Title in hand. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and practicality. The exterior remains striking, finished in its original deep metallic paint that still holds a brilliant shine, though a keen eye might spot a few minor stone chips consistent with careful road use. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin with supple leather seats that show minimal wear and a full suite of electronics that operate exactly as they should. Mechanically, this car is in robust health; it has been garage-kept and serviced religiously, with a recent full brake service and fresh fluids ensuring a smooth, responsive drive. It handles beautifully with no unexpected noises or vibrations. This is a reliable, turn-key example ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure continued excellence on the road. A premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile at a competitive valuation.
